lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me the basics of fishing please?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Ah, you've lost your net have you? Have another!

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I see you already have a net.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Ahoy, to fish, you click on the shrimp fishin' spot while ye'r carrying a net.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see... is that it?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: There's far more as you progress - not just shrimps. You get more equipment, bigger fish and other things too...

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: When you have a full inventory, you can cook it or take it to the bank. You can find a bank on the roof of the castle in Lumbridge and a cookin' range in the castle kitchen.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Arrr.. if yer lookin' fer quests you should head over to the Mountain Dwarf who lies north-west of Taverley and have a chat with him, I'm sure he can point you in the right direction.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I can show ye on that map of yours if ya like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already know about the basics of fishing, got any tips?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Ah, you've lost your net have you? Have another!

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I see you already have a net.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Arrr, chose carefully where and what you fish, you can get different fish in different places throughout the land.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Make sure you hang on to your fish, don't throw them away as you can get valuable cooking experience from them, gar! Look out for other things too...

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Then of course there is always the trawler...

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: If you venture to Port Khazard north of Yanille and speaks to me cabin boy Murphy, he can let you and a bunch of friends use his trawler to fish with... Just make sure you take a bailing bucket or two.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I can show ye on that map of yours if ya like?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any advice for an advanced fisher?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Ah, you've lost your net have you? Have another!

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I see you already have a net.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Aye, as you get better and better you'll find that you can fish for things like Tuna and Swordfish. These be very good for combat.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Of course, after that you will get Shark, and if you venture out onto the Trawler from Port Khazard, you can then get Manta Ray or Sea Turtle, very good eatin' on one of them.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can also use a fishing potion if you can get your hands on one and just need that little edge.. ask someone who is familiar with herblore.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Now.. quests...

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Head over to south of the Legends Guild and East of Ardougne and find Caroline. This will have you investigating some strange happenings on the fishing platform.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Head over to Tai Bwo Wannai Village on the Isle of Karamja and speak to Timfraku to solve a strange mystery.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: I can show ye on that map of yours if ya like?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Can't rightly say's there's any I know of that you could handle at the moment, but come back when you're a bit more experienced and I'm sure I can give you a clue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about different fish.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Some rich rewards for big net fishin', make sure you be using a big net fishing spot though...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is that all?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Ahoy, there's also the fishin' guild if ya skilled enough, you can find it south west of Seers' Village.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where and what should I fish?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: A young and enthusiastic fisher. Try south of Draynor Village or the pier on the island of Karamja to fish for Shrimp at level 1 or Sardines at level 5. Aye, me parrot concurs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What parrot?

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Me parrot Percy on me shoulder thar! Arr!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oookay...sure, a parrot, on your shoulder.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Arrr!

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Herrin' can be fished from south of Draynor Village or the pier on the island of Karamja when you reach level 10.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can use your small net to catch Anchovies from south of Draynor when you reach level 15.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can practice your fly fishin' in the Lumbridge river to catch Trout at level 20.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Pike can be fished from Lumbridge river using your fishing rod and some bait with at least level 25 fishing.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Use your harpoon and see if you can catch yourself a few Tuna from the pier on the island of Karamja at level 35.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can use that Lobster pot from the pier on the island of Karamja to get yourself a whole bunch of the little critters once you reach level 40.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Congratulations, you can now harpoon Swordfish after level 50. Try the pier on the island of Karamja.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Herrin' can be fished from Catherby and some other places when you reach level 10.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can use a big net to catch Mackerel from Catherby when you reach level 16.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Cod can be fished from Catherby and some other places once you reach level 23.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can use your fishin' rod and some bait to catch Slimy Eel in the swamps at level 28.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can use your fishin' rod and some bait to catch Cave Eel in the caves below Lumbridge Swamp at level 38.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Bass can be caught at level 46 in your big net if you wander along to Catherby.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: Tuna and Swordfish can be harpooned - if you're good enough - from the thrivin' fishing village of Catherby, or if you can get in try the Fishin' Guild. Level 35 for Tuna and 50 for Swordfish.

lines.speaker: Fishing tutor
lines.text: You can also go talk to Murphy and see if you can use his trawler to catch Manta Ray and Sea Turtle if you're really good... Gar!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.
